one-to-one.name: company
one-to-one.title: Company
one-to-one.help: Company for which the configurations are made.

many-to-one.name: kilometricExpenseProduct
many-to-one.title: Kilometric expense product
many-to-one.help: When you create a kilometric expense line, an expense line will be created with the expense type you define here. Expense types are created and configured via the Configuration/Expense type menu in the Expenses module.

decimal.name: lunchVoucherWageShare
decimal.title: Lunch Voucher Wage Share
decimal.help: You can define here the employee share amount deducted from the nominal value of the lunch voucher.

decimal.name: lunchVoucherEmployersShare
decimal.title: Lunch Voucher Employer's Share
decimal.help: You can define here the employer share amount covered by the company on the nominal value of the lunch voucher.

many-to-one.name: toJustifyLeaveReason
many-to-one.title: Leave Reason for Leave to justify
many-to-one.help: Allows defining a default leave reason for absences to justify.

string.name: exportCodeForExtraHours
string.title: Export code for extra hour management
string.help: Code used in payroll exports for extra hours.

string.name: exportCodeForDuration
string.title: Export code for duration
string.help: Code used in payroll exports for the number of working days.

integer.name: minStockLunchVoucher
integer.title: Minimum Stock of Lunch Vouchers
integer.help: Allows indicating a minimum stock of lunch vouchers that you always want to have in stock.

integer.name: availableStockLunchVoucher
integer.title: Available Stock of Lunch Vouchers
integer.help: Allows defining how many lunch vouchers you have left in stock.

many-to-one.name: supplierLunchVoucher
many-to-one.title: Lunch voucher supplier
many-to-one.help: You can select here the lunch voucher supplier.

integer.name: lunchVoucherFormatSelect
integer.title: Lunch Voucher Format
integer.help: Allows indicating the format of lunch vouchers used in the company.

string.name: exportCodeForLunchVoucherManagement
string.title: Export code for lunch voucher management
string.help: Code used in payroll exports for lunch vouchers.

boolean.name: leaveMailNotification
boolean.title: Leave Request Notification Mail
boolean.help: By checking this box you can define notification email templates for leave requests. These are notification emails sent to users when they submit leave requests. Different templates can be configured for various scenarios (confirmation, refusal, validation, etc.).

many-to-one.name: sentLeaveTemplate
many-to-one.title: Sent Leave Request Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when a leave request is sent.

many-to-one.name: validatedLeaveTemplate
many-to-one.title: Validated Leave Request Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when a leave request is validated.

many-to-one.name: refusedLeaveTemplate
many-to-one.title: Refused Leave Request Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when a leave request is refused.

many-to-one.name: canceledLeaveTemplate
many-to-one.title: Canceled Leave Request Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when a leave request is canceled.

one-to-many.name: kilometricAllowanceRateList
one-to-many.title: Kilometric allowance rates
one-to-many.help: Allows defining the different kilometric allowance rates. You can enter different fiscal horsepower values with a custom rate for each.

boolean.name: timesheetMailNotification
boolean.title: Timesheet Notification Mail
boolean.help: By checking this box you can define notification email templates for timesheets. These are notification emails sent to users when they submit a timesheet. Different templates can be configured for various scenarios (confirmation, refusal, validation, etc.).

many-to-one.name: sentTimesheetTemplate
many-to-one.title: Confirmed Timesheet Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when a timesheet is confirmed.

many-to-one.name: validatedTimesheetTemplate
many-to-one.title: Validated Timesheet Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when a timesheet is validated.

many-to-one.name: refusedTimesheetTemplate
many-to-one.title: Refused Timesheet Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when a timesheet is refused.

many-to-one.name: canceledTimesheetTemplate
many-to-one.title: Canceled Timesheet Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when a timesheet is canceled.

boolean.name: expenseMailNotification
boolean.title: Expense Notification Mail
boolean.help: By checking this box you can define notification email templates for expenses. These are notification emails sent to users when they submit expenses. Different templates can be configured for various scenarios (confirmation, refusal, validation, etc.).

many-to-one.name: sentExpenseTemplate
many-to-one.title: Sent Expense Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when expenses are sent.

many-to-one.name: validatedExpenseTemplate
many-to-one.title: Validated Expense Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when expenses are validated.

many-to-one.name: refusedExpenseTemplate
many-to-one.title: Refused Expense Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when expenses are refused.

many-to-one.name: canceledExpenseTemplate
many-to-one.title: Canceled Expense Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when expenses are canceled.

many-to-one.name: expenseSequence
many-to-one.title: Expense Sequence
many-to-one.help: Allows defining a standard sequence for expenses.

boolean.name: extraHoursMailNotification
boolean.title: Extra Hours Notification Mail
boolean.help: By checking this box you can define notification email templates for extra hours. These are notification emails sent to users when they submit extra hours. Different templates can be configured for various scenarios (confirmation, refusal, validation, etc.).

many-to-one.name: sentExtraHoursTemplate
many-to-one.title: Confirmed Extra Hours Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when extra hours are confirmed.

many-to-one.name: validatedExtraHoursTemplate
many-to-one.title: Validated Extra Hours Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when extra hours are validated.

many-to-one.name: refusedExtraHoursTemplate
many-to-one.title: Refused Extra Hours Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when extra hours are refused.

many-to-one.name: canceledExtraHoursTemplate
many-to-one.title: Canceled Extra Hours Template
many-to-one.help: Email template sent when extra hours are canceled.

string.name: seniorityVariableName
string.title: Name for seniority variable
string.help: You can configure here the variable used in formulas for calculating seniority leave or bonuses.

string.name: ageVariableName
string.title: Name for age variable
string.help: You can configure here the variable used in formulas for calculating seniority leave or bonuses.

string.name: workingDaysVariableName
string.title: Name for working day variable
string.help: You can configure here the variable used in formulas for calculating seniority leave or bonuses.

string.name: totalWorkingDaysVariableName
string.title: Name for total working day in a period variable
string.help: You can configure here the variable used in formulas for calculating seniority leave or bonuses.

boolean.name: useUniqueProductForTimesheet
boolean.title: Use unique product for timesheet
boolean.help: If this configuration is enabled, a single product will be used on timesheets (in the activity field of the timesheet, for example a project manager product, consultant, etc.). This product is used in business financial reports to determine costs associated with time spent, and can be used when invoicing time spent to clients.

many-to-one.name: uniqueTimesheetProduct
many-to-one.title: Unique product for timesheet
many-to-one.help: Selection of the product that will be used on timesheet lines by default.

boolean.name: enableDPAE
boolean.title: Enable DPAE
boolean.help: This configuration enables the management of DPAE (pre-employment declaration).

string.name: healthService
string.title: Health service
string.help: You can indicate here the occupational health service of the company. It will be automatically used on DPAE generated from an employee form, in the dedicated tab.

many-to-one.name: healthServiceAddress
many-to-one.title: Health service address
many-to-one.help: You can indicate here the address of the occupational health service of the company. It will be automatically used on DPAE generated from an employee form, in the dedicated tab.
